rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraised value exemptions, while Educ. Code §29.095 governs student club grants funded by appropriated state funds. No direct statutory conflict exists between these provisions.
quote: From funds appropriated for purposes of this subchapter, the commissioner shall spend an amount not to exceed $4 million in any state fiscal biennium on the program.
_note: No direct conflict. Indirect fiscal pressure on state appropriations is possible but not a statutory conflict with this section.
